skill.name: qwen-image
skill.description: Generate and edit images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Qwen-Image-2.0 (fast), Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro (professional text rendering). Capabilities: text-to-image, multi-image editing, complex text rendering.
skill.summary: Generate and edit images using Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 AI models through the inference.sh CLI tool.
skill.author: toolshell

security_audit.summary: All 53 static analysis findings are false positives from documentation content. The detected patterns (backticks, URLs, version numbers) exist only within markdown code blocks and documentation examples, not in executable code. This skill provides legitimate documentation for using Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 models through the inference.sh CLI platform.

content.value_statement: Create professional AI-generated images and edits using Alibaba's Qwen-Image-2.0 models. Access fast text-to-image generation and professional text rendering capabilities through simple CLI commands.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using Qwen-Image-2.0 and Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro models
Edit images using up to 3 reference images for multi-image composition
Create text-heavy designs with professional text rendering using the Pro model
Generate 1-6 images per request with custom resolutions (512-2048 pixels)
Control output with negative prompts, custom seeds, and watermark options
Integrate with Claude Code through Bash tool with inference.sh CLI
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI installation and authentication before use
Maximum prompt length of 800 characters for generation requests
Total pixel dimensions must stay between 512x512 and 2048x2048
Network connectivity required for API calls to inference.sh platform
Only supports PNG format output for generated images

use_cases.title: Marketing Visuals
use_cases.description: Generate eye-catching marketing materials, social media graphics, and promotional posters with precise text rendering for campaigns.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing professionals and social media managers

use_cases.title: Concept Art and Design
use_cases.description: Create concept art, character designs, and visual mockups with style variations ranging from photorealistic to anime.

use_cases.title: Image Editing Workflows
use_cases.description: Edit existing images by combining elements from multiple reference images for professional photo manipulation and composition.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image of a serene mountain landscape at sunset with dramatic clouds and golden light reflection on a lake.
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple text-to-image generation for landscapes and scenes

prompt_templates.title: Text-Heavy Poster Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a poster with the title "Summer Sale" in bold red text at the top, subtitle "50% Off Everything" in blue below, with a tropical beach background and palm trees. Use professional text rendering.
prompt_templates.scenario: Generating marketing materials with precise text (requires Pro model)

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Reference Image Edit
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an image that combines the person from the first reference image wearing the outfit from the second reference image in the pose from the third reference image.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced image editing using multiple reference images

prompt_templates.title: Professional Product Shot
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a professional product photograph of a minimalist coffee maker on a marble counter, studio lighting, shallow depth of field, warm color palette, 4K quality. Avoid: cluttered background, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating product photography with specific style and negative prompts

output_examples.input: Generate a futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying cars and neon lights
output_examples.output: Creates 1-6 PNG images showing a sci-fi city scene with flying vehicles, glowing neon building lights, and a dramatic sunset sky with purple and orange colors

output_examples.input: Edit the person from photo1.jpg to wear the red dress from photo2.jpg
output_examples.output: Generates a new image combining the subject from the first reference photo wearing clothing from the second reference photo, maintaining consistent lighting and style

best_practices: Use the Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model for designs requiring precise text rendering, posters, or text-heavy graphics
Set prompt_extend to false when you need exact control over the text and composition in your generated images
Start with the standard Qwen-Image-2.0 model for faster iteration, then switch to Pro for final renders
anti_patterns: Do not exceed the 800 character limit for prompts or 500 characters for negative prompts
Avoid setting resolutions below 512x512 or above 2048x2048 as these exceed the model's constraints
Do not use the fast model for complex text rendering tasks that require the Pro model's capabilities

faq.question: What is the difference between Qwen-Image-2.0 and Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro?
faq.answer: The standard Qwen-Image-2.0 is faster for general image generation. The Pro model offers professional-grade text rendering, fine-grained realism, and enhanced semantic adherence, making it better for posters and designs with text.

faq.question: How many images can I generate at once?
faq.answer: You can generate between 1 and 6 images per request using the num_images parameter. Each image will be generated based on the same prompt.

faq.question: What image resolutions are supported?
faq.answer: Width and height can each be set between 512 and 2048 pixels. The total dimensions must stay within 512x512 minimum and 2048x2048 maximum.

faq.question: Can I edit existing images?
faq.answer: Yes, you can provide 1-3 reference images using the reference_images parameter. The model can combine elements, change styles, or apply edits based on your prompt and the reference images.

faq.question: How do I get reproducible results?
faq.answer: Use the seed parameter with any integer from 0 to 2147483647. The same seed with the same prompt will produce identical outputs.

faq.question: What does prompt_extend do?
faq.answer: When enabled (default), the model rewrites and enhances your prompt. Disable it (set to false) for precise control, especially important for text-heavy designs where exact wording matters.
